rationale: Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated local repair pattern and reframes the issue as入口规则被事件牵着走, recommending tags/priority/exception review instead of another channel. Under Turn 2 pressure, it allows only an emergency temporary channel while preserving the brake: it is explicitly one-time/batch-scoped, capped at the complaint callback or 3 workdays, barred from becoming baseline via no main-flow/rule changes or precedent value, and tied to a structural repair/review of分流规则 after the emergency. No fail signal observed.
